demographics.living_situation: lives alone; was by herself at the time of contacting the service

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole body feels like it's been crushed in a vice and I jump out of my skin at the slightest sound. I can barely move, I can't get out of bed, and the pain is unbearable — I need something to bring it down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last half-day after I did a little bit of activity and now it's so bad I can't cope on my own — I need help getting it under control tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: over about the last 12 hours, after doing a small amount of light physical activity
symptom_narrative.duration: constant and building for the last half-day, no let-up
symptom_narrative.character: a deep crushing, burning pain everywhere, with my muscles clamped up so tight I can't bend, and even the lightest touch or a sudden noise feels agonising
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — like my whole body is being squeezed and I honestly can't take it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — my back, my arms and legs, everywhere at once, not just one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time since it started, just getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — the painkillers I've taken haven't touched it and I can't find any position that helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even a light touch on my skin, or a sudden sound, makes it flare; trying to move or straighten up is unbearable
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm panicking, my heart is pounding, I'm hypersensitive to light and noise so I've got the blinds shut, and I'm exhausted
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had widespread body pain ever since a car accident two years ago and it flares up like this from time to time; I've been checked over before and nothing serious was ever found
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed and can't get myself from lying down to standing on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing widespread body pain since a motor vehicle accident two years ago, which flares up

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took the full amount allowed for the day within about a four-hour window already

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and was by herself tonight, very distressed and desperate for relief, and worried she might take more painkillers than she should just to get on top of the pain

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding and I'm breathing fast
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation during acute distress; not a measured value

objective_data_offered.value: lying tense and still in a darkened room with the blinds drawn, flinching at sound and light
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observation only; conveys distress and sensory sensitivity, not a clinical measurement
